AutoAgent — Self-Improving Generation ▼
AutoAgent autonomously improves your generation quality by iterating on prompt strategies. It generates test frames, analyzes failures, tweaks the harness, and keeps what works.

Look & World ▼
Continuity Rules
Examples: "Character always wears red jacket outdoors" • "Night scenes use blue-teal color grade" • "Rain is always present in flashback scenes" • "Camera never goes above eye level in interior scenes"

▸ How Generation Works Click to expand
Step 1First Frame — AI creates a still image using your character photos, costumes, and environment as references (via @tags). The shot type determines which references get priority. Step 2Animate — The first frame is sent as the starting image for video generation. The AI animates it into a 2-10 second clip. Step 3Review — Approve or regenerate each shot. Locked shots won't be accidentally overwritten.
Tip: Close-up shots prioritize character face detail. Wide shots prioritize environment. Choose your shot type carefully for the best results.
External tools: Drag & drop images or videos from Sora, Pika, Midjourney, ComfyUI or any tool directly onto a scene card. Images become first frames, videos become clips.
SHOTS
Status:
Review Status (badge) = your editorial workflow: Draft → Approved → Locked. Generation Status (chip) = whether AI has generated the frame/clip. These are independent — you can approve a scene before or after generating it.

Voice / Narration
Text to Speech (Runway)
Type your script and generate speech with AI voices
Voice Style Transfer
Upload recorded speech and transform it to a different voice style
No file
Voice Dubbing (Multi-Language)
Automatically dub your audio into another language while preserving voice character
No file
Voice Isolation (Remove Background)
Extract clean voice audio by removing background noise, music, and effects
No file
Or Upload Voice Audio
Custom Voice Clone ▼
Clone any voice from an audio sample. Upload a clean 30-60 second audio clip of the target voice. Works for celebrity impressions, custom characters, or real people (with permission).
These are starting points — upload a real voice sample for accurate cloning.
🎤
Drop voice sample or click to upload
Voice Providers:
• ElevenLabs — Best voice cloning quality, ~$0.30/1000 chars, requires API key
• Runway STS — Built-in speech-to-speech, uses your existing Runway credits
• Play.ht — Good alternative, requires API key
Legal Notice: Voice cloning of real people (celebrities, public figures) may violate publicity rights, copyright, or platform terms of service. Use cloned voices only with explicit permission or for personal/educational projects. LUMN Studio is not responsible for misuse of voice cloning technology.

Keyboard Shortcuts

    

      Ctrl+ZUndo last action
      Ctrl+YRedo last action
      Ctrl+SSave project
      Ctrl+Shift+SSave full project
      Ctrl+GGenerate all scenes
      Ctrl+EnterStitch video
      EscapeClose modal / preview
      NAdd new scene
      SpacePlay/pause preview
      1-6Switch workspace (Project→Output)
      DDuplicate hovered scene
      DeleteDelete hovered scene
      GGenerate first frame for hovered scene
      RRegenerate/refresh hovered scene
